text: In the first scene, I feel a sense of anticipation and quiet curiosity; the empty room behind glass promises a space for ideas and learning, but in this moment, silence and emptiness prevail. In the second scene, vibrant colors and displays energize me. I feel a spark of excitement and inspiration—the R+D wall invites contemplation on human invention and creativity. Here, I feel part of a greater quest for understanding and progress, surrounded by the playful spirit of research and discovery.
